revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 18 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 18 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦5月18日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[大同]]元年（[[806年]]_月_日） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]]に * 大同元年（806年_月_日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い大同に改元 * [[文久]]2年（[[1862年]]_月_日） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[明治]]2年（[[1869年]]_月_日） - [[榎本武揚]]らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]]を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]]が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== 誕生日 == * [[保延]]5年（[[1139年]]_月_日） - [[近衛天皇]]、76代[[天皇]]（+ [[1155年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（[[1333年]]_月_日） - [[北条守時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]16代[[執権]]（* [[1295年]]） * [[天正]]15年（[[1587年]]_月_日） - [[大村純忠]]、[[キリシタン大名]]・[[天正遣欧使節]]を派遣（* [[1533年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月17日 (旧暦)|5月17日]] 翌日[[5月19日 (旧暦)|5月19日]] - 前月[[4月18日 (旧暦)|4月18日]] 翌月[[6月18日 (旧暦)|6月18日]] *新暦[[5月18日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月18日'''は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[806年]][[6月8日]]） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]]に * 大同元年（ユリウス暦806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い[[延暦]]より大同に[[改元]] * [[文久]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1862年]][[6月15日]]） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月27日]]） - [[榎本武揚]]らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]]を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]]が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== 誕生日 == * [[保延]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1139年]][[6月16日]]） - [[近衛天皇]]、76代[[天皇]]（+ [[1155年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月26日]]） - [[松村淳蔵]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1919年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[6月30日]]） - [[北条守時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]16代[[執権]]（* [[1295年]]） * [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月23日]]） - [[大村純忠]]、[[キリシタン大名]]・[[天正遣欧使節]]を派遣（* [[1533年]]） * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[7月8日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、第3代[[紀州藩]]主（* [[1665年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月18日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[806年]][[6月8日]]） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]]に * 大同元年（ユリウス暦806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い[[延暦]]より大同に[[改元]] * [[文久]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1862年]][[6月15日]]） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月27日]]） - [[榎本武揚]]らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]]を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]]が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== 誕生日 == * [[保延]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1139年]][[6月16日]]） - [[近衛天皇]]、76代[[天皇]]（+ [[1155年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月26日]]） - [[松村淳蔵]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1919年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[6月30日]]） - [[北条守時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]16代[[執権]]（* [[1295年]]） * [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月23日]]） - [[大村純忠]]、[[キリシタン大名]]・[[天正遣欧使節]]を派遣（* [[1533年]]） * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[7月8日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、第3代[[紀州藩]]主（* [[1665年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

lets hope this actually works
Text replacement - "}}↵'''Lunar" to "}} ''{{subst:PAGENAME}}<!--Lunar"
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "

Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days

Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"
linking [[Butsumetsu]]
revision.text:
'''May 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 18'''<!--Lunar May18--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[806年]][[6月8日]]） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]]に * 大同元年（ユリウス暦806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い[[延暦]]より大同に[[改元]] * [[文久]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1862年]][[6月15日]]） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月27日]]） - [[榎本武揚]]らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]]を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]]が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== 誕生日 == * [[保延]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1139年]][[6月16日]]） - [[近衛天皇]]、76代[[天皇]]（+ [[1155年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月26日]]） - [[松村淳蔵]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1919年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[6月30日]]） - [[北条守時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]16代[[執権]]（* [[1295年]]） * [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月23日]]） - [[大村純忠]]、[[キリシタン大名]]・[[天正遣欧使節]]を派遣（* [[1533年]]） * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[7月8日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、第3代[[紀州藩]]主（* [[1665年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:仏滅]]

--> == Events == * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[806年]][[6月8日]]） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]]に * 大同元年（ユリウス暦806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い[[延暦]]より大同に[[改元]] * [[文久]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1862年]][[6月15日]]） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月27日]]） - [[榎本武揚]]らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]]を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]]が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * [[保延]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1139年]][[6月16日]]） - [[近衛天皇]]、76代[[天皇]]（+ [[1155年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月26日]]） - [[松村淳蔵]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1919年]]）
== Deaths == * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[6月30日]]） - [[北条守時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]16代[[執権]]（* [[1295年]]） * [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月23日]]） - [[大村純忠]]、[[キリシタン大名]]・[[天正遣欧使節]]を派遣（* [[1533年]]） * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[7月8日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、第3代[[紀州藩]]主（* [[1665年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] {{citation needed}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] [[zh:五月十八]] [[en:draft:May 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[806]][[6月8日]]） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]]に * 大同1st year（ユリウス暦806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い[[延暦]]より大同に[[改元]] * [[文久]]2年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1862]][[6月15日]]） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[6月27日]]） - [[榎本武揚]]らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]]を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]]が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * [[保延]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1139]][[6月16日]]） - [[近衛天皇]]、76代[[天皇]]（+ [[1155]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842]][[6月26日]]） - [[松村淳蔵]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1919]]）
== Deaths == * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333]][[6月30日]]） - [[北条守時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]16代[[執権]]（* [[1295]]） * [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587]][[6月23日]]） - [[大村純忠]]、[[キリシタン大名]]・[[天正遣欧使節]]を派遣（* [[1533]]） * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705]][[7月8日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、第3代[[紀州藩]]主（* [[1665]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[806]][[6月8日]]） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]]に * 大同1st year（ユリウス暦806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い[[延暦]]より大同に[[改元]] * [[文久]]2nd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1862]][[6月15日]]） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[明治]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[6月27日]]） - [[榎本武揚]]らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]]を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]]が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * [[保延]]5th year（ユリウス暦[[1139]][[6月16日]]） - [[近衛天皇]]、76代[[天皇]]（+ [[1155]]） * [[天保]]13rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1842]][[6月26日]]） - [[松村淳蔵]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1919]]）

== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]]2年/[[元弘]]3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]][[6月30日]]） - [[北条守時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]16代[[執権]]（* [[1295]]） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}}15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]][[6月23日]]） - [[大村純忠]]、[[キリシタン大名]]・[[天正遣欧使節]]を派遣（* [[1533]]） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}}2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]][[7月8日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、第3代[[紀州藩]]主（* [[1665]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[6月8日]] ） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]] に * 大同1st year ([[Julian calendar]] 806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い{{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} より大同に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[6月15日]] ） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[6月27日]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[6月16日]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[天皇]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[6月26日]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[6月30日]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 16代[[執権]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[6月23日]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[7月8日]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ）

== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]] に * 大同1st year ([[Julian calendar]] 806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い{{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} より大同に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[June 16]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[天皇]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 26]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 30]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 16代[[執権]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 23]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[July 8]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[6月8日]] ） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]] に * 大同1st year ([[Julian calendar]] 806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い{{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} より大同に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[6月15日]] ） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[6月27日]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[6月16日]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[天皇]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[6月26日]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[6月30日]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 16代[[執権]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[6月23日]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[7月8日]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ）

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[May 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[May 18 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] [[zh:五月十八]] [[en:draft:May 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]] に * 大同1st year ([[Julian calendar]] 806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い{{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} より大同に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[June 16]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[天皇]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 26]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 30]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 16代[[執権]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 23]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[July 8]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] [[zh:五月十八]] [[en:draft:May 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]] に * 大同1st year ([[Julian calendar]] 806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い{{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} より大同に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[June 16]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[天皇]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 26]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 30]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 16代[[執権]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 23]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[July 8]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]] に * 大同1st year ([[Julian calendar]] 806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い{{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} より大同に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一

revision.text:
[[sn:May 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] [[zh:五月十八]] [[en:draft:May 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]] に * 大同1st year ([[Julian calendar]] 806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い{{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} より大同に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[June 16]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[天皇]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 26]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 30]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 16代[[執権]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 23]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[July 8]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

[[sn:May 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] [[zh:五月十八]] [[en:draft:May 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]] に * 大同1st year ([[Julian calendar]] 806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い{{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} より大同に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[June 16]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[天皇]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 26]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 30]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 16代[[執権]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 23]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[July 8]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]] に * 大同1st year ([[Julian calendar]] 806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い{{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} より大同に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[June 16]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[天皇]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 26]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 30]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 16代[[Shikken]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 23]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[July 8]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ）

[[sn:May 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] [[zh:五月十八]] [[en:draft:May 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]] に * 大同1st year ([[Julian calendar]] 806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い{{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} より大同に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[June 16]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 26]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 30]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 16代[[Shikken]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 23]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[July 8]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]] に * 大同1st year ([[Julian calendar]] 806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い{{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} より大同に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - Prince Andon ascends the throne and becomes the 51st [[Emperor Heizei]] * The first year of Datong (June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar) --With the enthronement of Emperor Heijo, the name was changed from {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} to [[Daidō]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - Moved the Sosho Observatory outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed it the Western Book Bureau * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一 * Meiji 2 (June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar) --Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, Goryokaku, and surrendered to the new government army. The Boshin War ended, and the Restoration government unified the whole country
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[June 16]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 26]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year/[[:en:Genkō_(1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 30]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 16代[[Shikken]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 23]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[Christian Daimyō]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[July 8]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ）
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Lunar May" to "Lunisolar May"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] [[zh:五月十八]] [[en:draft:May 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - Prince Andon ascends the throne and becomes the 51st [[Emperor Heizei]] * The first year of Datong (June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar) --With the enthronement of Emperor Heijo, the name was changed from {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} to [[Daidō]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - Moved the Sosho Observatory outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed it the Western Book Bureau * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一 * Meiji 2 (June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar) --Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, Goryokaku, and surrendered to the new government army. The Boshin War ended, and the Restoration government unified the whole country
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[June 16]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 26]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year/[[:en:Genkō_(1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 30]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 16代[[Shikken]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 23]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[Christian Daimyō]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[July 8]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - Prince Andon ascends the throne and becomes the 51st [[Emperor Heizei]] * The first year of Datong (June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar) --With the enthronement of Emperor Heijo, the name was changed from {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} to [[Daidō]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - Moved the Sosho Observatory outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed it the Western Book Bureau * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一 * Meiji 2 (June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar) --Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, Goryokaku, and surrendered to the new government army. The Boshin War ended, and the Restoration government unified the whole country
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[June 16]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 26]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year/[[:en:Genkō_(1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 30]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 16代[[Shikken]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 23]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[Christian Daimyō]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[July 8]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

== Events == * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[June 8]] ） - Prince Andon ascends the throne and becomes the 51st [[Emperor Heizei]] * The first year of Datong (June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar) --With the enthronement of Emperor Heijo, the name was changed from {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} to [[Daidō]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1862]] [[June 15]] ） - Moved the Sosho Observatory outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed it the Western Book Bureau * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 27]] ） - [[榎本武揚]] らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]] を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]] が終結し維新政府が全国を統一 * Meiji 2 (June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar) --Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, Goryokaku, and surrendered to the new government army. The Boshin War ended, and the Restoration government unified the whole country
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1139]] [[June 16]] ） - [[近衛天皇]] 、76代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1155]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[June 26]] ） - [[松村淳蔵]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year/[[:en:Genkō_(1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[June 30]] ） - [[北条守時]] 、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 16代[[Shikken]] （* [[1295]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 23]] ） - [[大村純忠]] 、[[Christian Daimyō]] ・[[天正遣欧使節]] を派遣（* [[1533]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[July 8]] ） - [[徳川綱教]] 、第3代[[紀州藩]] 主（* [[1665]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]]

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daidō|ja|大同}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[806]] {{ill|June 8|ja|6月8日}}) – Prince Andon ascended the throne and became the 51st Emperor, later known as {{ill|Emperor Heizei|ja|平城天皇}}. * (The first year of Datong – June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar – with the enthronement of Emperor Heijō, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} to {{ill|Daidō|ja|大同}}.) * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1862]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}}) – The Sosho Observatory was moved outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed the Western Book Bureau. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1869]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}) – Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, {{ill|Goryokaku|ja|五稜郭}}, and surrendered to the new government army. (This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1139]] {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}) – {{ill|Konoe Tennō|ja|近衛天皇}}, the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[1155]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1842]] {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}}) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵}}, a military personnel (died [[1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元亨}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Morotoki|ja|北条守時}}, the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1295]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1587]] {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}}) – {{ill|Ōmura Sumitada|ja|大村純忠}}, a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[1533]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1705]] {{ill|July 8|ja|7月8日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|ja|徳川綱吉}}, the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[1665]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daidō|ja|大同}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[806]] {{ill|June 8|ja|6月8日}}) – Prince Andon ascended the throne and became the 51st Emperor, later known as {{ill|Emperor Heizei|ja|平城天皇}}. * (The first year of Datong – June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar – with the enthronement of Emperor Heijō, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} to {{ill|Daidō|ja|大同}}.) * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1862]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}}) – The Sosho Observatory was moved outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed the Western Book Bureau. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1869]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}) – Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, {{ill|Goryokaku|ja|五稜郭}}, and surrendered to the new government army. (This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1139]] {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}) – {{ill|Konoe Tennō|ja|近衛天皇}}, the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[1155]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1842]] {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}}) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵}}, a military personnel (died [[1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元亨}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Morotoki|ja|北条守時}}, the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1295]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1587]] {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日}}) – {{ill|Ōmura Sumitada|ja|大村純忠}}, a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[1533]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1705]] {{ill|July 8|ja|7月8日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|ja|徳川綱吉}}, the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[1665]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]]

== Births == * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1139]] {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Konoe Tennō|ja|近衛天皇|12=draft}}, the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[1155]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1842]] {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|12=draft}}, a military personnel (died [[1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元亨|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Morotoki|ja|北条守時|12=draft}}, the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1295]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1587]] {{ill|June 23|ja|6月23日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōmura Sumitada|ja|大村純忠|12=draft}}, a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[1533]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1705]] {{ill|July 8|ja|7月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|ja|徳川綱吉|12=draft}}, the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[1665]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月18日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[806年]][[6月8日]]） - 安殿親王が即位して第51代・[[平城天皇]]に * 大同元年（ユリウス暦806年6月8日） - 平城天皇の即位に伴い[[延暦]]より大同に[[改元]] * [[文久]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1862年]][[6月15日]]） - 蕃書調所を一橋門外に移し洋書調所と改称 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月27日]]） - [[榎本武揚]]らが最後の拠点・[[五稜郭]]を開城し新政府軍に降伏。[[戊辰戦争]]が終結し維新政府が全国を統一
== 誕生日 == * [[保延]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1139年]][[6月16日]]） - [[近衛天皇]]、76代[[天皇]]（+ [[1155年]]） * [[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[6月26日]]） - [[松村淳蔵]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1919年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[6月30日]]） - [[北条守時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]16代[[執権]]（* [[1295年]]） * [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月23日]]） - [[大村純忠]]、[[キリシタン大名]]・[[天正遣欧使節]]を派遣（* [[1533年]]） * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[7月8日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、第3代[[紀州藩]]主（* [[1665年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[5月18日 (旧暦)]] to [[May 18 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 18일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十八]][[zh:五月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839646]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 18|qq=May 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – Prince Andon ascended the throne and became the 51st Emperor, later known as [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * (The first year of Datong – June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar – with the enthronement of Emperor Heijō, the era name was changed from [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] to [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]].) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – The Sosho Observatory was moved outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed the Western Book Bureau. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryokaku]], and surrendered to the new government army. (This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1139|1139]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Emperor Konoe|Konoe Tennō]], the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1155|1155]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Junzō|qq=|1=Matsumura Junzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531438}}, a military personnel (died [[:en:1919|1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Moritoki|Hōjō Morotoki]], the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1295|1295]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Sumitada|Ōmura Sumitada]], a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[:en:1533|1533]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]], the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[:en:1665|1665]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.

(This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1139|1139]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Emperor Konoe|Konoe Tennō]], the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1155|1155]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Junzō|qq=|1=Matsumura Junzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531438}}, a military personnel (died [[:en:1919|1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Moritoki|Hōjō Morotoki]], the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1295|1295]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Sumitada|Ōmura Sumitada]], a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[:en:1533|1533]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]], the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[:en:1665|1665]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – Prince Andon ascended the throne and became the 51st Emperor, later known as [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * (The first year of Datong – June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar – with the enthronement of Emperor Heijō, the era name was changed from [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] to [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]].) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – The Sosho Observatory was moved outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed the Western Book Bureau. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryokaku]], and surrendered to the new government army. (This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1139|1139]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Emperor Konoe|Konoe Tennō]], the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1155|1155]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Junzō|qq=|1=Matsumura Junzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531438}}, a military personnel (died [[:en:1919|1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Moritoki|Hōjō Morotoki]], the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1295|1295]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Sumitada|Ōmura Sumitada]], a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[:en:1533|1533]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]], the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[:en:1665|1665]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518|qq=}}

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十八]] {{wikidata link|Q839646}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十八]][[zh:五月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839646]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 18|qq=May 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – Prince Andon ascended the throne and became the 51st Emperor, later known as [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * (The first year of Datong – June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar – with the enthronement of Emperor Heijō, the era name was changed from [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] to [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]].) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – The Sosho Observatory was moved outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed the Western Book Bureau. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryokaku]], and surrendered to the new government army. (This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1139|1139]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Emperor Konoe|Konoe Tennō]], the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1155|1155]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Junzō|1=Matsumura Junzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531438}}, a military personnel (died [[:en:1919|1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Moritoki|Hōjō Morotoki]], the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1295|1295]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Sumitada|Ōmura Sumitada]], a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[:en:1533|1533]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]], the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[:en:1665|1665]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

(This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)

== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十八]][[zh:五月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839646]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 18|qq=May 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – Prince Andon ascended the throne and became the 51st Emperor, later known as [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * (The first year of Datong – June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar – with the enthronement of Emperor Heijō, the era name was changed from [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] to [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]].) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – The Sosho Observatory was moved outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed the Western Book Bureau. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryokaku]], and surrendered to the new government army. (This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1139|1139]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Emperor Konoe|Konoe Tennō]], the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1155|1155]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Junzō|1=Matsumura Junzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531438}}, a military personnel (died [[:en:1919|1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Moritoki|Hōjō Morotoki]], the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1295|1295]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Sumitada|Ōmura Sumitada]], a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[:en:1533|1533]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]], the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[:en:1665|1665]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518|qq=}}

(This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)

== Events == * [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – Prince Andon ascended the throne and became the 51st Emperor, later known as [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * (The first year of Datong – June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar – with the enthronement of Emperor Heijō, the era name was changed from [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] to [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]].) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – The Sosho Observatory was moved outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed the Western Book Bureau. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryokaku]], and surrendered to the new government army. (This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1139|1139]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Emperor Konoe|Konoe Tennō]], the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1155|1155]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Junzō|1=Matsumura Junzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531438}}, a military personnel (died [[:en:1919|1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Moritoki|Hōjō Morotoki]], the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1295|1295]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Sumitada|Ōmura Sumitada]], a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[:en:1533|1533]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]], the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[:en:1665|1665]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518|qq=}}

revision.comment: Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 18일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十八]][[zh:五月十八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 18일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十八]][[zh:五月十八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十八]][[zh:五月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839646]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 18|qq=May 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – Prince Andon ascended the throne and became the 51st Emperor, later known as [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * (The first year of Datong – June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar – with the enthronement of Emperor Heijō, the era name was changed from [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] to [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]].) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – The Sosho Observatory was moved outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed the Western Book Bureau. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryokaku]], and surrendered to the new government army. (This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1139|1139]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Emperor Konoe|Konoe Tennō]], the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1155|1155]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Junzō|1=Matsumura Junzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531438}}, a military personnel (died [[:en:1919|1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Moritoki|Hōjō Morotoki]], the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1295|1295]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Sumitada|Ōmura Sumitada]], a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[:en:1533|1533]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]], the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[:en:1665|1665]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – Prince Andon ascended the throne and became the 51st Emperor, later known as [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * (The first year of Datong – June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar – with the enthronement of Emperor Heijō, the era name was changed from [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] to [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]].) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – The Sosho Observatory was moved outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed the Western Book Bureau. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryokaku]], and surrendered to the new government army. (This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1139|1139]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Emperor Konoe|Konoe Tennō]], the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1155|1155]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Junzō|1=Matsumura Junzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531438}}, a military personnel (died [[:en:1919|1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Moritoki|Hōjō Morotoki]], the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1295|1295]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Sumitada|Ōmura Sumitada]], a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[:en:1533|1533]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]], the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[:en:1665|1665]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – Prince Andon ascended the throne and became the 51st Emperor, later known as [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * (The first year of Datong – June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar – with the enthronement of Emperor Heijō, the era name was changed from [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] to [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]].) * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – The Sosho Observatory was moved outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed the Western Book Bureau. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryokaku]], and surrendered to the new government army. (This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1139|1139]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]]) – [[:en:Emperor Konoe|Konoe Tennō]], the 76th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1155|1155]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Junzō|1=Matsumura Junzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531438}}, a military personnel (died [[:en:1919|1919]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Moritoki|Hōjō Morotoki]], the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1295|1295]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Sumitada|Ōmura Sumitada]], a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born [[:en:1533|1533]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]], the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born [[:en:1665|1665]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

revision.comment: v25: Convert interwiki links [[:en:...]] to {{ill}} templates
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十八]][[zh:五月十八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十八]][[zh:五月十八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十八]][[zh:五月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839646]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 18|qq=May 18}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Datong (disambiguation)|en|Datong (disambiguation)|WD=Q295082|lt=Daidō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|806|en|806|WD=Q30021|lt=806}} {{ill|June 8|en|June 8|WD=Q2621|lt=June 8}}) – Prince Andon ascended the throne and became the 51st Emperor, later known as {{ill|Emperor Heizei|en|Emperor Heizei|WD=Q353558|lt=Emperor Heizei}}. * (The first year of Datong – June 8, 806 in the Julian calendar – with the enthronement of Emperor Heijō, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} to {{ill|Datong (disambiguation)|en|Datong (disambiguation)|WD=Q295082|lt=Daidō}}.) * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|WD=Q7698|lt=1862}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15}}) – The Sosho Observatory was moved outside the Hitotsubashi Gate and renamed the Western Book Bureau. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}}) – Takeaki Enomoto and others opened the last stronghold, {{ill|Goryōkaku|en|Goryōkaku|WD=Q1196357|lt=Goryokaku}}, and surrendered to the new government army. (This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * {{ill|Hōen|en|Hōen|WD=Q1193929|lt=Hoen}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1139|en|1139|WD=Q19608|lt=1139}} {{ill|June 16|en|June 16|WD=Q2653|lt=June 16}}) – {{ill|Emperor Konoe|en|Emperor Konoe|WD=Q373997|lt=Konoe Tennō}}, the 76th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1155|en|1155|WD=Q19650|lt=1155}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}}) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Junzō|1=Matsumura Junzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531438}}, a military personnel (died {{ill|1919|en|1919|WD=Q2157|lt=1919}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|WD=Q1069086|lt=Shōkyō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genkō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|WD=Q2657|lt=June 30}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Moritoki|en|Hōjō Moritoki|WD=Q1083395|lt=Hōjō Morotoki}}, the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1295|en|1295|WD=Q5560|lt=1295}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1587|en|1587|WD=Q6744|lt=1587}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23}}) – {{ill|Ōmura Sumitada|en|Ōmura Sumitada|WD=Q2728800|lt=Ōmura Sumitada}}, a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born {{ill|1533|en|1533|WD=Q6443|lt=1533}}). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1705|en|1705|WD=Q6830|lt=1705}} {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|WD=Q2692|lt=July 8}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|en|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|WD=Q313745|lt=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi}}, the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born {{ill|1665|en|1665|WD=Q7582|lt=1665}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518|qq=}}

(This marked the end of the Boshin War and the unification of Japan under the Restoration government.) * (Meiji 2, June 27, 1869 in the Gregorian calendar – alternative account of the above event.)
== Births == * {{ill|Hōen|en|Hōen|WD=Q1193929|lt=Hoen}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1139|en|1139|WD=Q19608|lt=1139}} {{ill|June 16|en|June 16|WD=Q2653|lt=June 16}}) – {{ill|Emperor Konoe|en|Emperor Konoe|WD=Q373997|lt=Konoe Tennō}}, the 76th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1155|en|1155|WD=Q19650|lt=1155}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}}) – {{ill|Matsumura Junzō|ja|松村淳蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Junzō|1=Matsumura Junzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531438}}, a military personnel (died {{ill|1919|en|1919|WD=Q2157|lt=1919}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|WD=Q1069086|lt=Shōkyō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genkō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|WD=Q2657|lt=June 30}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Moritoki|en|Hōjō Moritoki|WD=Q1083395|lt=Hōjō Morotoki}}, the 16th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1295|en|1295|WD=Q5560|lt=1295}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1587|en|1587|WD=Q6744|lt=1587}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23}}) – {{ill|Ōmura Sumitada|en|Ōmura Sumitada|WD=Q2728800|lt=Ōmura Sumitada}}, a Christian daimyō who dispatched the Tenshō mission to Europe (born {{ill|1533|en|1533|WD=Q6443|lt=1533}}). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1705|en|1705|WD=Q6830|lt=1705}} {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|WD=Q2692|lt=July 8}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|en|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|WD=Q313745|lt=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi}}, the 3rd lord of the Kishū Domain (born {{ill|1665|en|1665|WD=Q7582|lt=1665}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|17|5|19|4|18|6|5|0518|qq=}}
